title: a #0001
definition:
1) first letter of Greek alphabet
 2) Christ is the Alpha to indicate that he is the beginning and the end
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) first letter of Greek alphabet
 2) Christ is the Alpha to indicate that he is the beginning and the end

    NASB:  alpha, as num. 1 or 1000, as pref. (1) negative (2) copulative (3) intensive (see also 256a).
